text.title: csharp-aspnet-core Core Rules
text.summary: Migrated testable rules for csharp-aspnet-core. Verify and refine before relying on for production.

rule.statement: Pass CancellationToken as the last parameter on every async controller action and thread it through to the service and repository layers.
rule.rationale: Without CancellationToken plumbing, client disconnects and request timeouts do not cancel in-flight DB queries, causing thread-pool starvation under load.

rule.statement: Use [Authorize] and [ProducesResponseType] on every action; configure RequireAuthenticatedUser() globally in Program.cs and opt out per route.
rule.rationale: Agents copy public endpoints into private controllers and forget [Authorize]; a default-authenticated policy prevents accidental exposure.

rule.statement: Add MapperConfiguration.AssertConfigurationIsValid() to a unit test; AutoMapper mapping errors surface only at request time otherwise.
rule.rationale: Agents add properties to DTOs without updating AutoMapper profiles; tests pass at compile time but prod 500s on first request.
